title: Tamagoyaki & Apple Crisps
description: A delightful fusion of Japanese tamagoyaki eggs and crunchy apple crisps.
instructions: 1. In a medium bowl, whisk together eggs, sugar, and salt.
2. Add water and whisk until smooth.
3. Heat a tamagoyaki pan or a small non-stick pan over medium heat.
4. Pour a small amount of the egg mixture into the pan and cook until the bottom is set.
5. Use a spatula to gently roll the egg mixture into a cylindrical shape.
6. Roll the tamagoyaki into a tight log and slice into 1-inch pieces.
7. Peel and slice the apple into thin rounds.
8. Heat oil in a large non-stick skillet over medium-high heat.
9. Fry the apple slices until crispy and golden brown.
10. Drain the apple crisps on paper towels and serve with tamagoyaki.
